user.title: BORA Raumluft-Wäschetrockner
user.description: Connect to a Roth-Kippe BORA dryer on your local network. The IP address must be reachable from Home Assistant.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect. Check the host/IP and that the BORA is powered on.
error.not_a_bora: Device responded but does not appear to be a BORA dryer.

init.title: BORA options
init.description: Optional: attach upstream entities from a smart plug (e.g. a Shelly in front of the dryer). The switch enables a 'Power' control on the BORA device; the power and energy sensors are mirrored under the BORA device for unified history and dashboards.

filter_maintenance_due.title: BORA: filter maintenance due
filter_maintenance_due.description: Filter operating hours: {hours} h (threshold: {threshold} h). Clean or replace the filter, then acknowledge on the BORA's display to reset the counter.
